summary: Iteration 34 - Staff Training Module Testing Complete. All 7 requested features VERIFIED: 1) Staff Training Portal at /staff/training ✓, 2) Training Modules tab shows 6 modules including 'About ASR Enterprises' ✓, 3) AI Training Assistant API works ✓, 4) Training Modules API returns modules ✓, 5) Call Scripts tab shows Hindi scripts ✓, 6) Quick Reference tab shows subsidy/pricing info ✓, 7) AI Assistant tab with Hindi suggested questions ✓. Additionally verified HR Management Training tab embeds the same portal.
critical_code_review_comments: StaffTraining.js: Well-structured component with 6 training modules, all properly rendered with progress tracking via localStorage
server.py lines 1789-1859: AI Training Assistant endpoint properly configured with role-specific prompts (telecaller, sales, technician, manager)
server.py lines 1862-1938: Training modules and progress endpoints implemented correctly with MongoDB persistence
HRManagement.js line 497-503: StaffTraining component properly embedded in HR Management Training tab with staffRole='manager'
seed_data_creation: None - test data prefixed with TEST_ for cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Staff Training Module fully functional. Public access at /staff/training (no auth required). Admin can also access via HR Management > Training tab (auth required). AI Training Assistant responds in Hindi/English with accurate PM Surya Ghar subsidy information.

modules: PM Surya Ghar Yojana (45 mins, 6 topics)
